sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA No.117 of 2018 a/w ITRA No. 119, 124, 125 & 128 of 2018, Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of Case For hearing of Main Case 12.02.2026 None present These Matters are pending since last seven years without any progress. Today counsel for the Applicant remained unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the Applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported in PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference applications are dismissed for non- prosecution. Office is instructed to place a copy of this order in connected reference applications. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad PS
